# Innovating Hygiene. Delivering Trust.

An India-based FMCG manufacturing company building cleaner, safer homes through science-backed hygiene and
home care solutions.

With Us](https://frezoolindustries.com/contact.html) [Learn\\

Who We
Are

## Building India's Hygiene Infrastructure

Frezool Industries Private Limited is a professionally
managed FMCG manufacturing enterprise headquartered in India. We specialize in the formulation,
production, and distribution of hygiene and home care products that meet the highest standards of safety
and efficacy.

With a focus on institutional trust, regulatory compliance, and
scalable manufacturing, we serve B2B partners, distributors, and institutional buyers across the country.


#### Modern Facility

State-of-the-art manufacturing unit

#### Quality Certified

ISO compliant processes

#### Pan-India Reach

Growing distribution network

#### R&D Driven

Science-backed formulations

Our
Verticals

## Diverse Hygiene Solutions

From formulation to distribution, we cover the complete value chain in home care
manufacturing.

### Home Care

Complete range of floor cleaners, surface cleaners, and
bathroom hygiene solutions for modern Indian homes.

[Learn more](https://frezoolindustries.com/business.html)

### Cleaning Solutions

Specialized cleaning products including glass cleaners,
disinfectants, and multi-surface formulations.

[Learn more](https://frezoolindustries.com/business.html)

### Personal Hygiene

Hand wash and sanitization products designed for
health-conscious consumers and institutional buyers.

[Learn more](https://frezoolindustries.com/business.html)

Our Flagship Brand

## Phenora

Phenora is our home care brand built on the promise of
effective, accessible hygiene. From phenyl to hand wash, every Phenora product is crafted with care and
backed by quality.

Herbal Floor
CleanerToilet
CleanerGlass
CleanerSurface
CleanerHand
Wash

Phenora

records for partner confidence.

Flexible engagement models including contract manufacturing and
private label partnerships.

Every product that leaves our facility carries the Frezool promise of safety, efficacy, and regulatory
integrity.

Brand
Showcase

# Phenora

Premium home care solutions for the modern Indian home.


## Clean Homes, Happy Lives

Phenora is Frezool Industries' flagship home care brand —
conceived to deliver effective, safe, and pleasantly formulated
cleaning products to Indian households. Every Phenora product is
the result of careful formulation, rigorous testing, and a deep
understanding of Indian cleaning needs.


The brand represents our commitment to bringing world-class
hygiene solutions to everyday consumers at accessible price
points, without ever compromising on quality or safety.


#### Brand Philosophy

Effectiveness first — products must deliver real cleaning
power


Safety always — formulations tested for user and
environmental safety


Accessible pricing — premium quality doesn't mean premium
pricing


Indian-first design — made for Indian homes, Indian water,
Indian conditions


Product
Range

## Phenora Products

Products displayed are for informational purposes only.


Home
Care

### Phenora Phenyl

Powerful floor cleaning phenyl with long-lasting fragrance and
germ-killing formulation.


Bathroom

### Phenora Toilet Cleaner

Thick formula toilet cleaner with deep stain removal and
disinfectant properties.


Glass

### Phenora Glass Cleaner

Streak-free glass and surface cleaner for crystal-clear shine
on all glass surfaces.


Multi-Surface

### Phenora Surface Cleaner

Multi-surface cleaner for kitchens, tables, and everyday
surfaces with antibacterial action.


Hygiene

### Phenora Hand Wash

Gentle yet effective hand wash with moisturizing formula for
everyday hand hygiene.


### D2C Platform Coming Soon

Phenora products will soon be available for direct purchase
online. Stay tuned for updates.


[Get\\
Notified](https://frezoolindustries.com/phenora.html#contact)

Disclaimer: Products displayed are for informational purposes only.
No transactions are facilitated on this website.

Manufacturing

# Manufacturing & Quality

Where precision meets purpose — inside our manufacturing
ecosystem.


## Manufacturing Capabilities

Our manufacturing facility is equipped with modern machinery for
liquid filling, mixing, blending, and packaging. We maintain
clean room standards in critical production zones and follow
standard operating procedures at every stage.


#### Semi-Automated Production Lines

Consistent output with minimal manual intervention


#### Flexible Packaging Options

Bottles, pouches, cans — multiple SKUs supported


#### Warehouse & Logistics

Organized storage with FIFO inventory management


#### Scalable Capacity

Designed to scale for seasonal and institutional demand


## Quality Control

Quality is not a department at Frezool — it's a culture. Our QA
processes start from raw material inspection and continue
through every stage until the finished product is dispatched.


#### In-House Testing Lab

pH, viscosity, stability, and microbial testing


#### Batch Documentation

Complete batch records with full traceability


#### Incoming Material Inspection

Every raw material tested before approval


#### Final Product Release

No product shipped without QA sign-off


### Hygiene & Safety Standards

- Production area hygiene
protocols including gowning and
sanitation

- Worker safety training
and PPE compliance

- Hazard identification and
risk assessment (HIRA)

- Chemical handling and
storage safety measures

- Emergency response
procedures in place


### R&D Capabilities

- Formulation development
for new products

- Stability testing and
shelf-life validation

- Custom formulation for
B2B partners

- Continuous improvement of
existing formulations

- Benchmarking against
industry standards

Compliance

# Certifications & Compliance

Full transparency on our regulatory standing, certifications, and
legal registrations.


Legal
Identity

## Company Registration Details

Company Name


Frezool Industries Private Limited


CIN Number


U20231UP2025PTC236832


GST Identification Number


09AAGCF7170H1ZE


Udyam Registration (MSME)


UDYAM-UP-50-0244660


Company Type


Private Limited Company


Registered Under


Companies Act, 2013

\\* Some registration numbers shown as placeholders and will be
updated with actual values.


Certifications

## Our Certifications

ISO

#### ISO 9001:2015

Quality Management System

Certified quality management system ensuring consistent product
quality and continuous improvement.


ISO

#### ISO 14001:2015

Environmental Management

Environmental management system certification demonstrating our
commitment to sustainable operations.


#### MSME Registration

Udyam Registered

Registered under the Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium
Enterprises, Government of India.


#### GST Compliance

Goods & Services Tax

Fully GST compliant with regular filings and transparent tax
documentation.


#### Pollution Control

State PCB Compliance

Compliant with State Pollution Control Board norms for
manufacturing emissions and effluent discharge.


#### Safety Standards

Factory & Workplace Safety


Adherence to Factories Act, 1948 and workplace safety
regulations including fire safety and chemical handling.

Sustainability

# Responsible Manufacturing

Our commitment to the environment, our people, and future
generations.


## Environmental Responsibility

At Frezool Industries, we recognize that manufacturing has an
environmental footprint — and we take that responsibility
seriously. Our sustainability approach is practical, measurable,
and integrated into our daily operations rather than being a mere
marketing statement.


### Safe Chemical Usage

We prioritize formulations that use chemicals approved by
relevant Indian regulatory bodies. Raw materials are sourced
from certified suppliers with proper MSDS documentation. We
avoid restricted substances and continuously explore bio-based
alternatives.


### Waste Management

Our waste management practices include segregation of hazardous
and non-hazardous waste, proper disposal through authorized
agencies, and efforts to minimize production waste through
process optimization and recycling where feasible.


### Water & Energy

We monitor water consumption and effluent discharge as per PCB
norms. Energy-efficient machinery and optimized production
scheduling help reduce our carbon footprint per unit of output.


### Sustainability Goals

We are working towards measurable sustainability targets
including reduced packaging waste, increased use of recyclable
materials, and achieving zero liquid discharge capability in the
medium term.

## About Frezool Industries

About
Us

# Our Story, Our Purpose

From a vision to make quality hygiene accessible, to a growing
manufacturing enterprise serving India.


## Company Overview

Frezool Industries Private Limited was established with a singular
mission: to manufacture and deliver hygiene and home care products
that Indian families and institutions can trust completely. As a
private limited company registered under the Companies Act, 2013,
we operate with full corporate governance, regulatory compliance,
and professional management.


Our operations encompass the complete manufacturing value chain —
from raw material sourcing and formulation development to
production, quality testing, and distribution logistics. We are
not just a factory; we are a systems-driven organization built for
reliability and scale.


Headquartered in India, Frezool Industries serves a growing
network of distributors, institutional buyers, and brand partners
across multiple states, with ambitions to become a recognized name
in the Indian FMCG manufacturing landscape.


### Our Vision

To become one of India's most trusted and respected FMCG
manufacturing companies, known for uncompromising quality,
regulatory excellence, and meaningful contribution to the
hygiene and home care sector.


### Our Mission

To manufacture and distribute high-quality hygiene and home care
products through ethical business practices, robust quality
systems, and sustainable operations — while creating value for
our partners, employees, and stakeholders.


Values

## What We Stand For

#### Integrity

Transparent, honest, and ethical in every interaction.


#### Quality

Never compromise on product safety and efficacy.


#### Innovation

Continuously improve through research and development.


#### Responsibility

Accountable to people, planet, and partners.


Our Journey

## The Founding Story

Frezool Industries was born from a simple observation: millions
of Indian households deserve access to hygiene products that are
not just affordable, but truly effective and safe. The gap
between premium imported brands and unorganized local
manufacturers presented an opportunity — to build a
professional, systems-driven manufacturing company that could
bridge this gap.


With deep domain knowledge in chemical formulation and a
commitment to regulatory compliance, the founders set out to
create an organization that would earn trust not through
marketing noise, but through manufacturing excellence and
corporate transparency.


From setting up the first production line with stringent quality
protocols, to launching the Phenora brand as a showcase of our
capabilities, every step has been guided by the principle of
doing things right — even when no one is watching.


Leadership

## Our Leadership

#### ADITYA RAJ SINGH

Managing Director & CEO

#### AMAN RAJ

Director & CFO

#### YUVRAJ GUPTA

Director

Leadership details to be updated as per company disclosure policy.

Our
Business

# FMCG Manufacturing Excellence

Comprehensive home care manufacturing capabilities built on
quality, compliance, and scale.


## Manufacturing Overview

Frezool Industries operates as a full-spectrum FMCG manufacturer
specializing in hygiene and home care products. Our manufacturing
infrastructure is designed to handle liquid, gel, and paste
formulations across multiple product categories with consistent
quality output.


We serve multiple business channels — from our own branded
products under Phenora, to contract manufacturing and private
label solutions for institutional and retail partners.


Categories

## Product Categories

### Home Care

Floor cleaners, bathroom cleaners, and household disinfectant
solutions for daily hygiene maintenance.


### Cleaning Solutions

Glass cleaners, surface cleaners, and specialized cleaning
formulations for commercial and domestic use.


### Personal Hygiene

Hand wash liquids and sanitization products for
health-conscious consumers and institutional deployment.


Capabilities

## Business Capabilities

### Contract Manufacturing

We offer end-to-end contract manufacturing services for brands
looking for reliable production partners. From formulation to
packaging, we handle it all.


- Custom formulations

- Flexible batch sizes

- Quality documentation


### Private Labeling

Launch your own brand with our manufacturing backend. We provide
complete private label solutions with full regulatory support.


- Brand-customized packaging

- Regulatory documentation

- Confidentiality assured


### Distribution Network

Our growing distribution network ensures products reach markets
efficiently across multiple Indian states.


- Multi-state coverage

- Warehouse support

- Logistics partnerships

# Innovating Hygiene. Delivering Trust.

Who We
Are

## Building India's Hygiene Infrastructure

Frezool Industries Private Limited is a professionally
managed FMCG manufacturing enterprise headquartered in India. We specialize in the formulation,
production, and distribution of hygiene and home care products that meet the highest standards of safety
and efficacy.

With a focus on institutional trust, regulatory compliance, and
scalable manufacturing, we serve B2B partners, distributors, and institutional buyers across the country.


#### Modern Facility

State-of-the-art manufacturing unit

#### Quality Certified

ISO compliant processes

#### Pan-India Reach

Growing distribution network

#### R&D Driven

Science-backed formulations

Our
Verticals

## Diverse Hygiene Solutions

From formulation to distribution, we cover the complete value chain in home care
manufacturing.

### Home Care

Complete range of floor cleaners, surface cleaners, and
bathroom hygiene solutions for modern Indian homes.

[Learn more](https://frezoolindustries.com/business.html)

### Cleaning Solutions

Specialized cleaning products including glass cleaners,
disinfectants, and multi-surface formulations.

[Learn more](https://frezoolindustries.com/business.html)

### Personal Hygiene

Hand wash and sanitization products designed for
health-conscious consumers and institutional buyers.

[Learn more](https://frezoolindustries.com/business.html)

Our Flagship Brand

## Phenora

Phenora is our home care brand built on the promise of
effective, accessible hygiene. From phenyl to hand wash, every Phenora product is crafted with care and
backed by quality.

Herbal Floor
CleanerToilet
CleanerGlass
CleanerSurface
CleanerHand
Wash

[Explore\\
Phenora](https://frezoolindustries.com/phenora.html)

P

Phenora

Home Care Solutions

Manufacturing

## Quality at Every Step

Our manufacturing processes are designed to deliver consistency, safety, and
scalability.

#### Automated Lines

Semi-automated filling & packaging

#### Lab Testing

In-house quality assurance lab

#### Batch Tracking

Full traceability from raw to finished

#### Certified Standards

ISO & regulatory compliant

Compliance

## Certifications & Standards

ISO

ISO 9001

Quality

ISO

ISO 14001

Environment

MSME

Udyam Registered

GST

Registered

PCB

Compliance

[View\\
all certifications](https://frezoolindustries.com/certifications.html)

#### Regulatory Compliant

Fully compliant with all applicable Indian manufacturing,
environmental, and safety regulations.

#### Scalable Production

Capacity to scale operations for large institutional orders and
distribution requirements.

#### Transparent Operations

Complete documentation, batch traceability, and open compliance
records for partner confidence.

#### Partner-First Approach

Flexible engagement models including contract manufacturing and
private label partnerships.

Why
Frezool

## Built on Trust, Driven by Quality

We understand that in the FMCG space, trust is everything.
Every product that leaves our facility carries the Frezool promise of safety, efficacy, and regulatory
integrity.

[Start\\
a Conversation](https://frezoolindustries.com/contact.html)

Whether you're a distributor, institutional buyer, or
looking for contract manufacturing — we'd love to hear from you.

Careers

# Join the Frezool Team

Build your career with a growing FMCG manufacturing company.


## Work Culture

At Frezool Industries, we believe that a great company is built
by great people. Our work culture emphasizes professionalism,
mutual respect, continuous learning, and ownership.


#### Growth Opportunities

Clear career paths in manufacturing, quality, sales, and
operations


#### Learning & Development

Training programs and skill development initiatives


#### Inclusive Environment

Equal opportunity workplace with fair policies


#### Safe Workplace

Compliant, safe, and well-maintained facility


### Hiring Philosophy

We hire for attitude and train for skill. We look for people who
are honest, hardworking, eager to learn, and committed to doing
quality work. Experience is valuable, but willingness to grow is
non-negotiable.


### Open Positions

#### Production Supervisor

Full-Time

Experience in FMCG liquid manufacturing preferred.
Responsible for line supervision and production planning.


Manufacturing Unit2-5 Years

#### Quality Assurance Executive

Full-Time

B.Sc/M.Sc in Chemistry. Responsible for in-process quality
checks and lab testing.


Quality Lab1-3 Years

#### Sales & Distribution Executive

Full-Time

FMCG sales experience preferred. Manage distributor
relationships and territory growth.


Field-Based2-4 Years

#### Don't see a suitable role?

Send your resume to
info@frezoolindustries.com
and we'll keep you in mind for future openings.

# Corporate Information

Transparent disclosure for investors, partners, and stakeholders.


## Company Details

Frezool Industries Private Limited


CIN

Date of Incorporation


+915224750257

Registered Office


Upper Ground Floor, 1166 Lekhraj Dollar, Faizabad Road, Indira Nagar, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh,
226016, India.

Managing Director & CEO

DIN: 11392129

Director & CFO

Director

DIN: 11392127

and MCA records.


## Corporate Governance

- Company governed by the
provisions of the Companies Act,
2013

- Annual returns and
financial statements filed with the
Registrar of Companies

- Statutory audits
conducted by a qualified Chartered
Accountant

- Board meetings
conducted as per statutory requirements

- Proper maintenance of
statutory registers and records


## Legal Disclosures

#### Important Notice

This website is a corporate information platform and does not
constitute an offer to sell or solicitation of an offer to buy
any securities of Frezool Industries Private Limited. The
company is a private limited company and its shares are not
publicly traded.


All information on this website is provided for general
informational purposes. While we strive for accuracy, we make
no warranties about the completeness of information. Investors
and partners should conduct independent due diligence.

# Privacy Policy

Last updated: 01.04.2026

**1\. Introduction**

Frezool Industries Private Limited ("we", "us",
"our") is
committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains
how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when
you visit our website.


**2\. Information We Collect**

We may collect personal information
that you voluntarily
provide to us when you contact us through forms, email, or phone.
This may include your name, email address, phone number,
organization name, and inquiry details.


**3\. How We Use Your Information**

We use the information we collect
to respond to your
inquiries, provide requested information about our products and
services, improve our website, and communicate with you about
business opportunities.


**4\. Information Sharing**

We do not sell, trade, or rent your
personal information to
third parties. We may share information with service providers who
assist us in operating our website or conducting our business,
subject to confidentiality agreements.


**5\. Data Security**

We
implement appropriate technical and organizational security
measures to protect your personal information. However, no method
of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.


**6\. Cookies**

Our website
may use cookies to enhance your browsing experience. Please refer
to our Cookie Policy for more details.


**7\. Your Rights**

You
have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal
information. To exercise these rights, please contact us at
info@frezoolindustries.com.


**8\. Changes to This Policy**

We may update this Privacy Policy from
time to time.
Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.


**9\. Contact**

For
privacy-related inquiries: Frezool Industries Private Limited,
Email: info@frezoolindustries.com

# Terms & Conditions

Last updated: 01.04.2026

**1\. Acceptance**

By
accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound
by these Terms and Conditions.


**2\. Nature of Website**

This website is a corporate information
platform for
[Industries Private Limited.](https://frezoolindustries.com/) It does not facilitate any
eCommerce transactions, product purchases, or online ordering.


**3\. Intellectual Property**

All content on this website, including
text, graphics,
logos, images, and design elements, is the property of [Frezool\\
Industries Private Limited](https://frezoolindustries.com/) and is protected by intellectual
property laws.


**4\. Use Restrictions**

You may not reproduce, distribute, modify,
or create
derivative works from any content on this website without prior
written permission.


**5\. Information Accuracy**

While we strive to provide accurate and
up-to-date
information, we make no warranties about the completeness or
accuracy of information on this website.


**6\. Limitation of Liability**

Frezool Industries Private Limited
shall not be liable for
any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising
from the use of this website.


**7\. Third-Party Links**

This website may contain links to
third-party websites. We
are not responsible for the content or practices of these
websites.


**8\. Governing Law**

These
terms are governed by the laws of India, and any disputes shall be
subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of courts in India.


**[9\. Contact](https://frezoolindustries.com/contact.html)**

For
terms-related inquiries: info@frezoolindustries.com

# Disclaimer

**General Disclaimer**

The
information provided on this website is for general informational
purposes only. While Frezool Industries Private Limited endeavors
to keep the information accurate and up-to-date, we make no
representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied,
about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, suitability, or
availability of the information, products, services, or related
graphics contained on this website.


**No Commercial Offer**

This website does not constitute an offer to
sell products.
Product displays under the Phenora brand are for informational and
showcase purposes only. No pricing, ordering, or transactional
features are available on this website.


**No Investment Advice**

Nothing on this website should be construed
as investment
advice, a solicitation, or an offer to buy or sell securities.
Frezool Industries Private Limited is a private limited company
and its shares are not publicly traded.


**Third-Party Content**

Any third-party content, trademarks, or
references
mentioned on this website belong to their respective owners.


**External Links**

Links
to external websites are provided for convenience only. Frezool
Industries Private Limited does not endorse or take responsibility
for the content of external sites.

# Cookie Policy

Last updated: 01.04.2026

**What Are Cookies**

Cookies are small text files stored on your
device when you
visit a website. They help the website remember your preferences
and improve your browsing experience.


**How We Use Cookies**

We
may use essential cookies to ensure the basic functionality of our
website and analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact
with our website.


**Types of Cookies**

- **Essential Cookies:**
Required for the website to function properly.

- **Analytics Cookies:** Help
us understand website traffic and usage patterns.


**Managing Cookies**

You
can control or delete cookies through your browser settings.
Please note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of
this website.


**Contact**

For
cookie-related inquiries: info@frezoolindustries.com
